name: @kantosaurus/origin
//name: scripts/build.mjs sets name from PKG_PREFIX (lib/platform.js, default @kantosaurus/origin) at publish time; keep this in sync for local `npm pack`/readers.
//version: Placeholder. scripts/build.mjs --version stamps the real version (in lockstep with the Cargo workspace tag) at publish time; this committed value is never what ships.
description: Origin — a fast, terminal-native AI coding agent. Install globally and run `origin` to launch the TUI.
